Forbidden Knowledge.name: Forbidden Knowledge
Forbidden Knowledge.description: Randomly toss 3 coins and perform 1 -3 magic attacks based on the number of heads. Deals 40% Damage to all enemies within a 350 range and inflicts one random debuff for 2 turns (ATK Decrease: ATK reduced by 20%, Defense Decrease: DEF reduced by 20%, SPD Decrease: SPD reduced by 20%, Weak: Anger gain reduced by 20%) Each debuff can stack up to 3 times.

Multi-Layer Shield.name: Multi-Layer Shield
Multi-Layer Shield.description: At the start of each public round, gain 5 layers of 25% Shield. Each time you take Damage, reduce layers by  1. Reset at the start of the next public round.
